name: Payment & Billing System
description: Complete Stripe billing: subscriptions, invoices, tax, usage tracking

sharedRules.noEmojis: No emojis in code, comments, UI, logs, or documentation
sharedRules.featureBasedModules: Organize code by feature, not by layer
sharedRules.researchFirst: Use Context7 MCP + Brave Search before ANY implementation. Document findings.
sharedRules.workflowEnforced: Commit → Push → Update JSON → Write Report. In that order.
sharedRules.testBeforeComplete: Run full test suite before marking step complete. All tests must pass.
sharedRules.fullyImplemented: No placeholders, TODOs, or incomplete code. Everything must work.
sharedRules.modularArchitecture: Keep files under 250 lines. Split when needed.
sharedRules.seoOptimized: All frontend pages must have proper meta tags, structured data, and semantic HTML
sharedRules.apiVersioning: All APIs must be versioned (v1, v2) with backward compatibility policy

workflow: 1. Research: Use Context7 MCP (library docs) + Brave Search (best practices)
5. Run all tests: npm run test:all (or equivalent)
7. Commit with conventional commit: feat(phase{}): step Y - title
9. Update this phase{}.json with completion data
11. Mark step as completed in JSON
12. Create Pull Request, get review, merge

steps.implementationNotes: Usage-Based Billing & Overage system complete. Core library (6 modules, ~665 lines), 3 API endpoints, Paystack payment integration, comprehensive metrics, unit & integration tests, OpenAPI documentation. Multi-tenancy enforced. Quota enforcement with overage calculations. Fire-and-forget payment request creation with idempotency.

steps.implementationNotes: Tax integration complete with Paystack. Core library (tax-integration, ~140 lines), tax configuration API (/api/tax/config GET/POST), integration with usage billing for tax calculation on overage invoices. Database: Organization now supports taxRate, taxName, taxId fields. Unit tests (12 passing) and integration tests (6 passing). Multi-tenancy and RLS enforced.

steps.implementationNotes: Payment method management system with Paystack integration. Features: customer creation, card add/remove, default card management, org-scoped access, RLS enforcement. Fixed TypeScript typing issues in paystackRequest. All tests passing (12 unit, 8 integration).

steps.title: Feature Management System for Billing Toggle
steps.objective: Complete implementation of Feature Management System for toggling between free/paid modes with production-ready quality, following all mandatory rules.

requiredSearches: PostgreSQL feature toggle patterns with RLS
questions: What are the security considerations for feature flags?
How to test feature flag inheritance effectively?
What are common pitfalls in feature management implementation?

step1.description: Design and implement the core Feature Management system with global flags and org overrides
details: Add FeatureFlag model (key, name, description, enabled)
Add OrganizationFeatureFlag model (orgId, featureKey, enabled nullable)
Define proper relations and indexes
Ensure RLS policies for org isolation
Implement get/set global feature flags
Implement get/set/delete org overrides
Implement isFeatureEnabled with inheritance logic
Implement checkFeatureAccess with detailed reasoning
Add initializeFeatureFlags for seeding defaults

step3.description: Create admin API routes for feature management
details: SUPER_ADMIN only endpoints
GET /admin/features - list all flags with overrides
POST /admin/features/:key - set global flag
GET /admin/features/org/:orgId - list org overrides
POST /admin/features/org/:orgId/:key - set/remove override
DELETE /admin/features/org/:orgId/:key - remove override

step4.description: Create feature check middleware for protecting billing routes
details: Create requireFeature() middleware factory
Implement org context extraction
SUPER_ADMIN bypass logic
402/403 response handling
Inline checkFeatureInHandler helper

step5.description: Integrate feature checks into payment methods API and other billing routes
details: Import checkFeatureAccess
Add requirePaymentsFeature() helper
Apply 'payments_enabled' check to all payment method handlers
Return 402 when feature disabled

step6.description: Write comprehensive unit and integration tests
details: Unit tests: test all service functions, mock Prisma, test inheritance logic
Integration tests: test admin API endpoints with SUPER_ADMIN auth, org override CRUD, conflict scenarios
Test feature enforcement in payment methods API

step7.description: Register admin feature routes in server and run all tests
details: Add import for registerFeatureRoutes
Register with prefix '/admin/features'
Run full test suite: npm run test:all
Fix any TypeScript or ESLint errors

step8.description: Update phase3.json and create implementation report
details: Add Step 8.5 entry with completion data
Write report: reports/phase3-step8.5-report.md
Mark Step 8 as COMPLETED (payment methods already done)
Document testing results and deployment notes

tests: Feature check middleware properly blocks disabled features
Payment methods API returns 402 when payments_enabled=false
manuallyVerify: Feature flags can be toggled via SUPER_ADMIN API
Org overrides inherit correctly from global flags
Payment methods endpoint blocks access when disabled
Admin feature UI shows override summaries
Database transactions safe with proper indexes
acceptanceCriteria: Complete implementation of Feature Management System
Global flags and org overrides functional
Admin API endpoints secure and operational
Billing features protected by feature checks

reportTemplate.summary: Brief summary of what was implemented for Feature Management System
decisions: Inheritance model: org override null = global, true/false = forced
HTTP status codes: 402 for feature disabled (billing context), 403 for unauthorized
No caching layer - direct DB access (acceptable for admin-controlled flags)
challenges: Payment methods integration tests failing due to missing feature check mock - resolved by adding checkFeatureAccess mock

steps.implementationNotes: Feature Management System successfully implemented with global flags and per-org overrides. Key achievements: 6 new files created, 3 files modified, 47 new tests added (28 unit + 19 integration) all passing. System enables toggling billing features (payments, invoices, tax, coupons, usage billing) at global and organization levels. Admin API at /admin/features provides full CRUD for SUPER_ADMIN. Feature check middleware enforces 402 responses for disabled features. Fixed payment methods integration tests by adding proper mocking for checkFeatureAccess. All tests passing with >95% coverage on feature management code.
